translations.en: a gentleman with an air of leadership about him.
translations.zh: 一位氣宇軒昂、自帶領袖風範之紳士。

translations.en: "Good $T, Avatar. Is there ought else I can aid thee with?"
translations.zh: 「$T 吉祥，聖者。還有什麼吾能助汝之事嗎？」

translations.en: "Thou art the Avatar! I saw thy portrait in Lord British's castle."
translations.zh: 「汝便是聖者！吾曾在不列顛王的城堡中見過汝的畫像。」

translations.en: "If there be any assistance I can offer, thou needst but ask it."
translations.zh: 「若吾有任何可效勞之處，汝但說無妨。」

translations.en: "I am Lord Aganar of @Moonglow."
translations.zh: 「吾乃@Moonglow（月華）城之阿加納爾爵主。」

translations.en: "I keep things running smoothly here. 'Tis not difficult in a town of such @honesty."
translations.zh: 「吾在此地維持一切秩序。此乃不難之事——此城百姓甚為@honesty（誠實）。」

translations.en: "Verily, 'tis a fine town. Hast thou ever thought of moving here?"
translations.zh: 「誠然，此乃好地方。汝可曾想過遷居至此？」

translations.en: "Aye, indeed."
translations.zh: 「確實如此。」

translations.en: "Thou wilt see much drinking at the Blue Bottle Tavern, and singing, and revelry, and telling of tales."
translations.zh: 「在藍瓶酒館，汝可見人們飲酒、歌唱、歡鬧、講述故事。」

translations.en: "But mostly @drinking."
translations.zh: 「但主要還是@drinking（飲酒）。」

translations.en: "If thou art curious, why not go pay a visit?"
translations.zh: 「若汝好奇，何不前往一探？」

translations.en: "Thou cannot miss it - 'tis the biggest building in town."
translations.zh: 「此乃城中最大的建築，汝不會錯過的。」

translations.en: "Honesty is the virtue we prize most highly here in Moonglow."
translations.zh: 「誠實乃吾等在月華城最為珍視的美德。」

translations.en: "We are closest to the @Shrine of Honesty, and indeed, the @Rune of Honesty was entrusted into my care some years ago."
translations.zh: 「吾等距@Shrine（聖壇）聖壇最近，而@Rune（符文）符文數年前也曾委托吾代為保管。」

translations.en: "'Tis north of here, on Dagger Isle."
translations.zh: 「此乃在此地以北，位於匕首島上。」

translations.en: "Aye, just a ways to the north."
translations.zh: 「是的，往北行一段路即是。」

translations.en: "I had it once, but I entrusted it to @Beyvin's care, as he is the most honest man I know."
translations.zh: 「吾曾持有，但吾已將之托付@Beyvin（貝文）保管，他是吾所知最誠實的人。」

translations.en: "He lives with @Penumbra."
translations.zh: 「他與@Penumbra（潘布）拉同住。」

translations.en: "Penumbra might be able to help you with that."
translations.zh: 「潘布拉或許能在此事上助汝。」

translations.en: "I can't imagine what Beyvin sees in her!"
translations.zh: 「吾實在想不透貝文看上她哪裡！」

translations.en: "Haven't seen him around lately. Penumbra should be able to tell you where to find him."
translations.zh: 「近來不見他蹤影。潘布拉應知他的下落。」

translations.en: "Until next we meet, then."
translations.zh: 「那就後會有期。」

translations.en: "Well you might ask..."
translations.zh: 「汝倒也問得……」

translations.en: "Thou wouldst not regret it."
translations.zh: 「汝必不會後悔的。」

translations.en: "There's good @fishing off our shores, and plenty of merriment to be found over at the Blue @Bottle."
translations.zh: 「吾等岸邊@fishing（釣魚）甚佳，藍@Bottle（瓶酒）館亦有諸多歡鬧樂事。」

translator_notes: 阿加納爾是月華城爵主，語氣高貴有禮，帶古典 thee/thou 風格。Beyvin 音譯為「貝文」。Penumbra 譯為「潘布拉」（半影之意）。
